rule: Parse URLs with Go standard library net/url before applying policy checks
Configured scheme value must be http or https; reject any other URL scheme
Require scheme to be exactly https
Permit URL.Host to contain an explicit port
When provided require URL.Hostname() to equal an allowed domain or end with "." plus an allowed domain
By default reject IP host literals; when allowed require net.ParseIP(URL.Hostname()) to succeed for IPv4 or IPv6 hosts
By default reject opaque URLs; when allowed permit net/url parses Opaque instead of Host
